description: Modified APA 7th Edition CSL style for Mendeley Reference Manager.  This version displays the first two authors followed by “et al.” when a source has three or more authors, applied consistently in both in-text citations and the bibliography.  The author connector has also been changed from “&” to “and” to match specific institutional formatting requirements.
